hero_prompt_logged_out: Sign in with Discord to get started.
history_desc: From a passion for competitive play came the OutKing Series - a circuit built to elevate the Portuguese VALORANT scene, season after season.
history_foundation_desc: The OutKing Series was born in 2024 with the goal of creating a competitive space dedicated to Portuguese talent in VALORANT.
history_first_season_desc: The inaugural season pitted the best national teams against each other in a league format with live playoffs.
history_future_desc: We're preparing new seasons, partnerships and surprises. The best is yet to come - stay tuned.
updates_desc: Follow the latest updates on seasons, schedules and announcements from the OutKing Series.
updates_next_season_desc: Details about the next season will be announced soon. Get your team ready and keep an eye on our socials.
updates_registration_open_desc: Team registrations are open. Gather your stack and secure your spot in the race for the crown.
updates_discord_desc: Join our community on Discord to meet other players, form teams and get updates first-hand.
updates_footer: More updates soon. Follow us so you don't miss a thing.
why_desc: More than a tournament, the OutKing Series is a platform for you to grow as a player and a team.
why_competition_desc: Face the best teams in Portugal in a fair and structured format. Every match counts towards your journey to the top.
why_broadcast_desc: Feature matches are streamed with Portuguese casting. Get your name out there and build your brand.
why_recognition_desc: Gain visibility in the national scene. Scouts, organisations and the community closely watch the talent emerging from OutKing.
why_progression_desc: Track your team's evolution season after season. Stats, history and rankings build your legacy in the series.
cta_desc: The next season is coming. Register your team and show what you're made of.
register_desc: Register your team to take part in the OutKing Series tournaments.
register_not_member_desc: It looks like you haven't joined the Outking server yet. Only server members can participate.
register_step2_desc: Add the team's players (up to 7, including substitutes).
register_flash_validation: Please fix the errors in the form.
register_flash_not_member: It looks like you haven't joined the Outking server. Join here first: {url}
register_flash_rank_fail: Some players don't meet the rank requirements (Ascendant 3 or higher).
rank_error_not_found: Riot ID not found. Check the name and tag.
rank_error_unranked: You don't have a competitive rank yet.
rank_error_network: Failed to check rank. Try again.
my_teams_empty: You haven't registered any teams yet.
error_404_desc: Looks like Cypher couldn't find this page. Not even his cameras caught it.
about_desc: The OutKing Series is a competitive VALORANT circuit focused on Portuguese talent. We're putting together more details about our story and mission.
about_link_text: In the meantime, check out the {rules} or the {teams} in the series.
archive_desc: History of past seasons, winners and memorable moments from the OutKing Series. The full archive will be available soon.
archive_link_text: Explore the series' {teams} or check out the tournament {rules}.
events_desc: Tournament calendar, matchdays and broadcasts for the OutKing Series. Stay tuned - upcoming events will be announced soon.
events_link_text: See the {teams} in the current season.
rules_intro_1: The OutKing Series started in 2024 with the goal of developing the competitive Valorant scene in Portugal. Since its creation, there have been 3 editions consisting of over 50 matches between many teams from around the country.
rules_intro_2: In 2026, the OutKing Series returns with new partnerships aimed at improving the quality of the experience for participating teams, viewers and the team running the competition.
rules_composition_desc: Teams participating in the tournament must have a minimum of 5 players. Each team can have up to 7 players (5 starters, 2 substitutes).
rules_coach_note: Teams may also register a coach. The coach may be a player as long as the team does not exceed the maximum number of players described above.
rules_staff_note: In addition to players and a coach, teams may also register up to 2 technical staff members, who may not play or be in the game - that spot is reserved exclusively for the coach.
rules_nationality_desc: In previous editions of the OutKing Series, teams were required to have at least 3 players who were residents or citizens of/in Portugal. This requirement is no longer in effect, so teams may be formed by players of any nationality and/or residence, without any restrictions.
rules_ranking_desc: Players wishing to sign up for the tournament must, at the time of registration, have a minimum rank of Ascendant 3 in competitive mode. Breach of this rule is punishable by being barred from playing in the tournament and disqualification of the team (if it fails to meet the minimum player count).
rules_registration_desc: The registration process must be followed by all participating teams, including invited ones. To register your team, click {here}.
footer_tagline: The biggest Valorant tournament in Portugal
